item.title: Apple Intelligence 获准与阿里巴巴 Qwen AI 一起在中国推出
item.summary: Apple Intelligence is headed to China after regulators approved Apple’s AI services through a partnership with Alibaba. The long-rumored deal will bring Alibaba’s Qwen AI models to Apple’s operating systems, marking a major expansion of the company’s generative AI platform into one of its most important markets.
